overall.description: A first-person perspective scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow panoramic pan across an industrial rooftop at night. The camera reveals a massive Petrochem corporate structure, two NPCs resting on a makeshift couch, and the neon-lit Night City skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rooftop beneath massive corporate structure

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera downward from the night sky to reveal the rooftop environment

entered.detail: massive curved industrial structure with large white PETROCHEM logo and crown symbol
dark night sky with scattered clouds and purple-blue atmospheric lighting
red warning light on tall pole extending from the building structure
metal scaffolding and pipe structures along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cloudy night beneath a massive Petrochem industrial facility. The camera looks up at the curved concrete wall bearing the corporate logo, then begins a slow downward pan revealing metal scaffolding and piping against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift rooftop living area with salvaged furniture

events.description: camera pans down to reveal two characters sitting on a red couch on the rooftop

agents.ego_description: panning horizontally across the rooftop to reveal the characters and their living space

notable_agents.action: character wearing green cap and dark jacket sitting on red couch, looking at a handheld device
character with white hair reclining on the same couch, relaxed posture

entered.detail: worn red sofa where the two characters are seated
small dark table with various items including a food container
tall white candle burning with visible flame providing warm light
blue and orange barrels and containers stacked near the building
black metal rack structure with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to a rooftop living space where two characters rest on a worn red couch. A table in the foreground holds a lit candle and takeout container, casting warm light on the concrete surface. Industrial barrels and metal shelving occupy the mid-ground while the Petrochem building looms on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic overlook of futuristic city skyline

events.description: view opens up to reveal the expansive Night City skyline with illuminated towers and neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right to take in the expansive cyberpunk cityscape view

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with various lighting patterns against the night sky
tall buildings with bright vertical neon lighting and holographic displays
glowing red and white light beams and projected advertisements between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera pans past the rooftop living area to reveal a breathtaking view of Night City. The Petrochem building exits the frame as the focus shifts to the distant skyline, where neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements illuminate the cloudy night sky with beams of colored light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins beneath a towering industrial monolith and expands into a wide panoramic view of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by looking up at the curved concrete wall of a massive Petrochem facility, slowly panning downward to reveal a network of metal scaffolding and piping against the cloudy night sky. As the camera descends, the view transitions into a makeshift rooftop living space where a lit candle and takeout container cast a warm glow over two characters resting on a worn red couch. The scene then shifts away from the industrial barrels and the looming corporate structure, panning across the concrete roof to open up the horizon. Finally, the focus settles on the breathtaking Night City skyline, where holographic advertisements and glowing skyscrapers pierce the dark clouds with beams of colored light.
